description.en: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.de: Starte einen asynchronen Crawl einer Website über mehrere Seiten. Gibt eine Job-ID zur Fortschrittsverfolgung zurück.
description.es: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.fr: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.ro: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.
description.it: Start an async crawl of a website following links across multiple pages. Returns a job ID to track progress.

vars.API_KEY: env:FIRECRAWL_API_KEY|Get your API key from the Firecrawl Dashboard at firecrawl.dev.

inputs.name: URL
inputs.description: The starting URL of the website to crawl.

inputs.name: Max Depth
inputs.description: Maximum depth to crawl (how many link levels deep from the start URL).

inputs.name: Page Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

success.en: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
success.de: Crawl-Job gestartet. Job-ID zum Statusabruf verwenden.
success.es: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
success.fr: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
success.ro: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
success.it: Crawl job started. Use job ID to check status.
